title: fix(collection): prevent markup parsing
body:
Prevent the request description from being parsed as markup.

Fixes #241.

step_plan.summary: Fix rendering of request descriptions in the collection browser to treat descriptions as plain text, avoiding markup parsing.

steps.operation: Wrap description rendering in RequestPreview.watch_request with a plain-text renderable
steps.reason: Current rendering passes the raw description string to a UI component that may interpret markup. Wrapping it in a plain-text renderable prevents markup parsing and renders the text as-is.
steps.side_effects: UI now renders descriptions as plain text; tests relying on markup rendering may require updates to expect plain text; may require importing/using a Text renderable; no changes to data model or persistence.
